name: The dashboard shows a stats summary and switches between tabs
description: A signed-in member sees a stats summary on the dashboard and can switch from the Bookings tab to the Waitlist tab.

planSteps.description: Open the sign in page from the header
Enter the email member@atelier.test into the email field
Enter the password MemberPass#2026 into the password field
Verify the dashboard shows a stats summary with Bookings, Hours booked, and Total spend
Verify the Waitlist section is shown, listing waitlist entries with a position or the message that the member is on no waitlists
